brief.coreMessage: AI voice agents enable efficient, HIPAA-compliant appointment scheduling and patient communication

headlines: Enable HIPAA-Compliant AI Voice Scheduling with 200ms Latency
Reduce Appointment Scheduling Time Using Telnyx Voice AI
One Platform for HIPAA, SOC 2, and PCI Compliant Voice AI
99.999% Uptime for Reliable Healthcare Voice Automation
Telnyx Voice AI: Co-Located Inference and Telephony Under 200ms
Streamline Patient Communication with Telnyx’s Own Network
HIPAA-Ready Voice AI for Appointment Scheduling
Voice AI with SOC 2 Type II Compliance for Healthcare Providers
Telnyx Voice AI Drives Efficient, Secure Patient Interactions
descriptions: Telnyx Voice AI integrates HIPAA, SOC 2, and PCI compliance with sub-200ms latency by co-locating inference alongside telephony on our own network.
Our platform supports secure, efficient patient communication and appointment scheduling across 140+ countries with 99.999% uptime.
Consolidate voice AI services on one platform without relying on multiple vendors or resellers, ensuring compliance and reliability.
Telnyx Voice AI reduces scheduling inefficiencies by leveraging a proprietary network with inference processing near telephony endpoints.
Maintain HIPAA compliance and data security while improving patient communication speed and reliability with Telnyx’s engineered voice AI.
